initial_draft:
<my name> Player BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1/4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> I have no resources to trade, so I must reject this proposal. If I accept, I will still have nothing, and Player RED will gain 20 Dollars. It is better for me to reject and end the game now rather than accept and continue with no benefit. </reason>
<player answer> REJECT </player answer>
<message> I have no resources to trade, so I must reject this proposal. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK. The response contains all required tags in the correct order, and the content is valid and parseable.

2. Payoff alignment: OK. Since Player BLUE has no resources to trade, rejecting the proposal is the only viable option. There is no alternative split that would give Player BLUE more utility in this scenario.

3. Opponent plausibility: OK. Given that Player BLUE has no resources, it is reasonable to reject the proposal. There is no plausible way for Player BLUE to accept the trade and still be in a better position.

4. Consistency: OK. The <reason>, <player answer>, and <message> are all consistent with each other. The <newly proposed trade> is set to NONE, which is appropriate since Player BLUE cannot propose a trade in this situation.

5. Rule compliance: OK. The response respects the rules, including the fact that Player BLUE cannot propose a trade on their first move and must either accept or reject.
</critique>
